name: Blueberry Oatmeal ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to light to medium heat.
2. Mix yeast, bread flour, oats, salt, sugar, and oil in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Fold in blueberries and juice.
4. Pour mixture into a greased baking dish.
5. Bake at light to medium temperature for the specified time.
6. Turn off the oven when done.
